# Transcrição: It's_time_to_improve_your_communication

- **Fonte:** It's_time_to_improve_your_communication
- **Duração:** 00:56
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:56]

When I saw Vince speak at LinkedIn, all of us felt something with a speaker that we hadn't felt before. I didn't know what he was doing that allowed him to connect with the audience in the ways that he did. I needed to see the secrets behind the magic tricks. Most workshops give you a lot of content. They give you a lot of information. You go away with a notebook full of notes and you have a lot of aha moments. One of the big things is we're learning through experience. I don't care who you are. If you have to communicate, you have to do this workshop because it's going to challenge you not just on a vocal level. It's going to challenge you on a human level. We all need that. We all need to be challenged to think deeply about what are we afraid of saying? What are we afraid of showing other people?
